summary: Relics are permanent items that give a passive bonus for the duration of the run. Most relics can be obtained regardless of the character you are playing. Each character has 9 Relics that can only be obtained by them. Starter Relics are given to each character when beginning a run. This starter relic can later be replaced with an upgraded  version by picking up the  from the   at the start of Act 2, when offered. {| class="wikitable"
